Customer Description: Professional refresh of existing gravel driveway using AB-3 road base. Includes delivery, spreading, and grading with tracked skid steer for a clean, even finish.
Add-ons: Pothole repair; Edge re-establishment; Light grading
Internal Notes: Typical residential drive 100-250 ft uses 8-18 tons. Confirm tonnage based on width/depth before quoting. Margin target 50%.

Customer Description: Professional spreading and grading of customer-supplied gravel using a tracked skid steer. Smooth, level finish with proper crown.
Internal Notes: Lower-margin work. Only book on small jobs or when paired with other services.

Customer Description: Targeted pothole repair using compacted AB-3 base. Cleaned, filled, and graded for a durable patch.
Internal Notes: Bundle 4+ potholes into Pothole Package. Single-pothole minimum $185 due to mobilization.

Customer Description: Reshape and re-crown an existing gravel drive for proper drainage and a smooth ride.
Internal Notes: 2-hr minimum. Most jobs 2-4 hrs. Push gravel-add-on at quote.

Customer Description: Removal of accumulated brush, limbs, and yard debris using grapple-equipped skid steer. Clean haul-off included.
Add-ons: Fence line cleanup; Storm debris removal
Internal Notes: Confirm if customer can burn on-site (rural). Pile size verified on-site; reserve right to re-quote.

Customer Description: Skid-steer-assisted cleanup of yard debris, fallen limbs, scrap, and accumulated material.
Internal Notes: Half-day minimum recommended unless paired with another service.

Customer Description: Rapid response storm debris cleanup. Tree limb removal, access clearing, debris staging or haul-off.
Add-ons: Small tree removal; Fence line work
Internal Notes: 4-hr minimum. Add 25% emergency surcharge for under 48-hr response.

Customer Description: Heavy-duty rotary cutting of tall grass, light brush, and overgrown pasture using skid-steer brush cutter. Suitable for grass up to 6 ft.
Add-ons: Fence line cleanup; Tree edge cleanup
Internal Notes: Hilly/wet acreage +20%. Best margin: 2+ acre flat jobs.

Customer Description: Aggressive brush cutting in dense overgrown areas using heavy-duty cutter attachment. Clears saplings up to 3 in diameter.
Internal Notes: Use when acre pricing won't cover density. Always quote site-unseen as range.

Customer Description: Restore fence lines overgrown with brush, vines, and saplings. Cleared to allow fence repair or visibility.
Add-ons: Brush haul-off; Tree removal at fence corners
Internal Notes: Density-based pricing. Light $4.50/ft, Medium $7.50/ft, Heavy $14/ft.

Customer Description: Stump ground to 4-6 in below grade using skid-steer stump grinder. Chips left on-site or hauled per request.
Add-ons: Chip haul-off; Soil and seed restoration
Internal Notes: Multi-stump discount: 10% off when 5+ stumps booked together; 15% off for 10+.

Customer Description: Removal of small trees up to 25 ft tall in accessible locations. Includes felling, sectioning, and stacking or haul-off.
Internal Notes: Typical 6-12 in trunk. No tall climbing. Refer to arborist for trees with overhead hazards or near structures.

Customer Description: Surface grading and leveling for yards, pads, lots, and driveway approaches.
Internal Notes: Add Harley rake premium ($225/hr) for finish work.

Customer Description: General dirt work including small excavation, fill, leveling, and pad prep.
Internal Notes: Confirm utility locates (Kansas One-Call) before quoting.

Customer Description: Targeted correction of standing-water issues - swale shaping, surface drainage, low-spot fill, or culvert assistance.
Internal Notes: Walk site before quoting. Avoid jobs requiring engineered designs.

Service Name: Material Spreading - Mulch / Topsoil / Decorative Rock
Customer Description: Bulk material delivery and professional spreading using skid steer.
Internal Notes: Charge separately for material + spread. Always quote material with markup.

Customer Description: Demolition and haul-off of sheds, small outbuildings, decks, fences, and accessory structures.
Internal Notes: Quote on site only. Confirm asbestos-free for pre-1980 structures.

Customer Description: Removal and haul-off of existing fencing including posts.
Internal Notes: Concrete-set posts +$3/ft. Barbed wire +$2/ft.

Customer Description: Tracked skid steer with experienced operator for hourly work. Versatile, productive, and efficient for a wide range of property tasks.
Internal Notes: 2-hr minimum on-site. See attachment matrix for upcharge per attachment.

Customer Description: Half-day skid steer service - ideal for medium cleanup, grading, or material spreading projects.
Internal Notes: Mobilization included within 25 mi.

Customer Description: Full-day skid steer service for larger property projects.
Internal Notes: Best margin. Mobilization included within 25 mi.

Customer Description: Up to 2 brush piles removed, 3 hours skid steer with grapple, light fence-line touch-up (up to 200 ft), and property debris haul-off (1 trailer load).
Add-ons: Additional brush piles; Extra fence line
Internal Notes: À la carte $1,650; saves $155. Most popular rural offering.

Customer Description: Up to 12 tons AB-3 delivered and spread, pothole repair (up to 6 holes), light grading and re-crown, edge re-establishment.
Internal Notes: À la carte $2,250; saves $255. Lead bundle for residential.

Customer Description: Up to 500 linear feet of fence line cleared (medium density), brush haul-off or push-to-burn-pile, corner tree/stump prep (up to 3 stumps under 12 in), 1 hour finish-grade touch-up.
Add-ons: Additional linear feet; Heavy density upgrade
Internal Notes: À la carte $4,650; saves $400. Project-style sale.

Customer Description: 6 hours skid steer with grapple, up to 3 brush piles consolidated/removed, 1 small tree removal (up to 12 in trunk, accessible), driveway clearing and access restoration.
Internal Notes: À la carte $2,150; saves $200. 25% emergency surcharge if booked within 48 hrs of event.

Customer Description: Up to 5 acres rotary mowing, fence-line touch-up (up to 250 ft), one brush pile pushed/cleared.
Internal Notes: Recurring revenue base. Schedule visits ~10 weeks apart May-October.

Customer Description: Three scheduled maintenance visits during the May-October season. Each visit includes up to 5 acres mowed, 250 ft fence-line touch-up, and one brush pile cleared.
Internal Notes: Saves $375 vs per-visit. Collect 1/3 deposit at signing.
